title: gladiolus dubius
intro: Gladiolus dubius, also known as the wild gladiolus or sword lily, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family, characterized by its tall spikes of small, blue or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus dubius include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Gladiolus dubius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in the form of a tincture or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
